calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Tatus Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared via zoom for Darin Keith (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated May 13, 2003 is admitted to probate. Darin Keith is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 13, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
